title: Mosaic Glass
description: Fabric Mod that adds a new Glass Block!
body:
### MOSAIC GLASS
This Fabric mods adds a new type of decorative Glass block and pane. It is craftable by combining 8 glass with  an Iron Ingot. Connected textures supported with ResourcePack and Optifine. You can download the resource pack for connected textures [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mosiacglassrp)

Original textures and resource pack by elwood612_

 IF YOU JUST WANT TO RETEXTURE GLASS YOU CAN DOWNLOAD THE ORIGINAL RESOURCEPACK [HERE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-stained-glass)
